=========
Array Ref
=========

#check foo[bar 3]

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (subscript
      object: (identifier)
      index: (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (number)))))

========
Subarray
========

#check foo[0:bar 3]

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (subscript
      object: (identifier)
      index: (number)
      stop: (application
        name: (identifier)
        arguments: (number)))))

================
Subarray No Stop
================

#check foo[0:]

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (subscript
      object: (identifier)
      index: (number))))

=================
Subarray No Start
=================

#check foo[:3]

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (subscript
      object: (identifier)
      stop: (number))))

======================
Subarray of Expression
======================

#check (foo 37)[:3]

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (subscript
      object: (parenthesized
        (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (number)))
      stop: (number))))

===========================
Subarray Does Not Have Step
===========================

#check foo[1:2:3]

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (subscript
      object: (identifier)
      index: (number)
      stop: (application
        name: (number)
        (ERROR)
        arguments: (number)))))

===========================
Subarray Does Not Have Copy
===========================

#check foo[:]

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (subscript
      object: (identifier))))

==================
Subarray vs. Range
==================

#check foo [1:2]

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (range
        start: (number)
        end: (number)))))

===========================
Multiple Function Arguments
===========================

#check foo 2 3 4

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (application
      (application
        (application
          (identifier)
          (number))
        (number))
      (number))))

===============
Named Arguments
===============

#check foo (bar := 3)

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (application
      (identifier)
      (named_argument
        (identifier)
        (number)))))

=====================
Mixed Named Arguments
=====================

#check foo 1 (bar := 3) 2 (baz := 4)

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (application
      (application
        (application
          (application
            (identifier)
            (number))
          (named_argument
            (identifier)
            (number)))
        (number))
      (named_argument
        (identifier)
        (number)))))

============
Field Access
============

#check FooBar.foo
#check foo.12

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (projection
      term: (identifier)
      name: (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (projection
      term: (identifier)
      name: (number))))

===================
Nested Field Access
===================

#check Foo.bar.baz.quux

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (projection
      (projection
        (projection
          (identifier)
          (identifier))
        (identifier))
      (identifier))))

=======================
Expression Field Access
=======================

#check (Foo.bar baz).baz

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (projection
      (parenthesized
        (application
          (projection
            (identifier)
            (identifier))
          (identifier)))
      (identifier))))

=================================
Application Across Multiple Lines
=================================

#eval f
2
3

  4

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (application
      name: (application
        name: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (number))
        arguments: (number))
      arguments: (number))))
